products.name: Apple iPhone 15
products.description: Apple iPhone 15 smartphone featuring a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display, A16 Bionic chip, 128GB storage, advanced dual-camera system with 48MP main sensor, Dynamic Island, USB-C connectivity, and all-day battery life.

products.name: Apple 20W USB-C Power Adapter
products.description: Official Apple 20W USB-C power adapter designed for fast charging compatible iPhone, iPad, and AirPods devices. Compact design ideal for travel and daily use.

products.name: Logitech MX Master 3S
products.description: Premium wireless productivity mouse featuring MagSpeed scrolling, customizable buttons, ergonomic design, USB-C charging, multi-device support, and up to 70 days of battery life.

products.name: Dell 24-inch Full HD Monitor
products.description: 24-inch IPS monitor with Full HD 1920x1080 resolution, anti-glare display, ultra-thin bezels, HDMI connectivity, and eye-comfort technology for professional and home use.

products.name: Samsung T7 Portable SSD 1TB
products.description: High-speed portable solid-state drive with 1TB storage capacity, USB 3.2 Gen 2 support, transfer speeds up to 1050MB/s, compact metal body, and password protection.

products.name: HP Wireless Keyboard
products.description: Slim wireless keyboard with low-profile keys, Bluetooth connectivity, long-lasting battery life, spill-resistant design, and compatibility with Windows and macOS devices.

products.name: Anker PowerCore 10000
products.description: Compact 10000mAh portable power bank featuring high-speed charging technology, USB-C input, lightweight design, and enough capacity for multiple smartphone charges.

products.name: Sony WH-CH520 Wireless Headphones
products.description: Bluetooth over-ear headphones with up to 50 hours battery life, built-in microphone, customizable EQ settings, lightweight design, and clear hands-free calling.

products.name: Amazon Echo Dot
products.description: Smart speaker powered by Alexa featuring voice control, smart home integration, music streaming support, weather updates, reminders, and compact modern design.

products.name: Apple Watch SE GPS
products.description: Advanced smartwatch featuring fitness tracking, heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, crash detection, water resistance, and seamless iPhone integration.

products.name: Xiaomi Smart Band 8
products.description: Fitness band with AMOLED display, heart rate monitoring, sleep analysis, workout tracking, water resistance, and up to 16 days battery life.

products.name: JBL Flip 6 Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker delivering powerful JBL Original Pro Sound, USB-C charging, IP67 rating, and up to 12 hours of playback.

products.name: Canon PIXMA All-in-One Printer
products.description: Wireless color inkjet printer supporting printing, scanning, and copying with mobile printing support and high-quality photo output.

products.name: TP-Link AC1200 WiFi Router
products.description: Dual-band wireless router providing stable high-speed internet connectivity, parental controls, guest network support, and easy setup management.

products.name: Lenovo ThinkPad Laptop Backpack
products.description: Durable laptop backpack with padded compartments, water-resistant exterior, multiple storage pockets, and ergonomic shoulder straps.

products.name: USB-C Fast Charging Cable
products.description: 1-meter braided USB-C cable supporting fast charging, high-speed data transfer, reinforced connectors, and universal device compatibility.

products.name: MacBook Air M3
products.description: Apple MacBook Air featuring the M3 chip, 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, 8GB unified memory, 256GB SSD storage, and all-day battery life.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S25
products.description: Flagship Android smartphone with advanced AI features, AMOLED display, premium camera system, fast charging support, and 256GB storage.

products.name: Nintendo Switch OLED
products.description: Hybrid gaming console featuring a vibrant OLED display, detachable Joy-Con controllers, TV docking support, and a vast game library.

products.name: WD Elements 2TB External HDD
products.description: Reliable portable hard drive with 2TB storage capacity, USB 3.0 connectivity, plug-and-play functionality, and compact lightweight design.
